_description: DepMap inferred molecular subtypes (per-cell-line specific hotspots, named driver fusions, integrated LoF for tumor suppressors, MSI). Source: OmicsInferredMolecularSubtypes.csv. LoF combines CN < 0.3, Likely-LoF mutation with AF > 0.5, or expression < 0.1 log-TPM — so it catches deletion-driven losses (e.g. CDKN2A homozygous deletion) that a damaging-mutation matrix alone would miss.
